hooks.command: bash -c 'MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 "^worktree " | cut -d" " -f2); [ -z "$MAIN" ] && exit 0; HOOK="$(dirname "$(dirname "$MAIN")")/.claude/hooks/restrict-to-repo-root.sh"; [ -f "$HOOK" ] || exit 0; exec bash "$HOOK"'

bash -c 'MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -m1 "^worktree " | cut -d" " -f2); [ -z "$MAIN" ] && exit 0; HOOK="$(dirname "$(dirname "$MAIN")")/.claude/hooks/guard-writes-to-worktree.sh"; [ -f "$HOOK" ] || exit 0; exec bash "$HOOK"'
